title: Senior Investment Banker at Equitas Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Equitas Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
